sqlMap.select: SELECT ISMAILRECEIVE, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
SELECT MEMBERID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISMAILRECEIVE = #isMailReceive#, LISTCNT = #listCnt#, ISPREVIEW = #isPreview#, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #previewListValue#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #previewContentValue# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId#
